community_pulse: The community is splitting between newcomers questioning initial weight gain and mental clarity versus long-term carnivores troubleshooting specific health issues (SIBO, histamine sensitivity, digestive concerns). There's also renewed interest in meal simplicity—ground beef with eggs is dominating engagement this week.

topics.title: The 2-Week Weight Gain Phase: Why You Might Gain Before You Lose on Carnivore
topics.angle: Address the specific anxiety newcomers are experiencing around initial weight gain while experiencing mental clarity—normalize it as a real phenomenon with metabolic explanation, not failure
topics.why_now: Multiple posts this week from people 2-4 weeks in reporting weight gain despite feeling mentally better; they're panicked and need reassurance with science
